headline: 3 Stocks Smart Investors Are Buying in July
summary: Berkshire Hathaway just built or expanded positions in an airline, a mega-cap platform, and a battered homebuilder during the same quarter, and the reasoning behind each pick reveals where patient institutional money sees the market mispricing real earnings power.

raw.headline: 3 Stocks Smart Investors Are Buying in July

headline: 10 U.S. metro areas where builders are slashing prices on new homes
summary: Existing-home prices just hit a new record high — but there are plenty of newly built homes selling at a discount, as desperate builders cut prices.
